findings.problem: Once Derry's confession and Caul's leverage are already clear, the chapter keeps certifying the intended emotion in explicit language: Maren says the choice is right, Aldric confirms Derry is choosing correctly, Derry says Maren will be all right, and Maren verbally proves he was listening. The scene still works, but at shortlist level this extra reassurance blunts the betrayal's sting and makes the goodbye feel slightly explained rather than fully endured.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the post-confession stretch in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:161-187 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:221-241. Keep Derry's parent-driven motive and the material farewell beats in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:195-199, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:241, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:259-279, but convert some of the current verbal reassurance into either a new practical consequence of Caul having their direction or a silence/gesture that leaves the hurt less cushioned.
findings.acceptance_test: After the confession lands in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:147-153, each later beat in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:161-241 must do one of two things on the page: change practical state (who takes what, when Derry leaves, what Caul now knows) or expose a fresh relational wound. Fail if the revised passage still includes lines that merely restate that Derry is justified or that Maren understands without adding new cost. Pass only if the ending in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:259-279 still preserves Derry's quiet departure and Caul's increased tracking advantage.

findings.problem: The chapter falls back on the same marked emphasis machinery often enough to read as a tic: clipped noun-phrase fragments after a complete sentence ('Not the fire. The road.' / 'Not alongside. Ahead.' / 'Not a question.') and simile-led emotional glosses ('like a stone dropped into water,' 'like a coin,' 'like wet wood splitting,' 'like a third pulse'). In a quiet chapter this repeated scaffold starts to make the prose sound pre-shaped instead of freshly observed.
findings.rewrite_direction: Vary the syntax and rendering in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:3-5, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:41-43, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:153-155, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:221-223 so those emphases do not all arrive through fragment tags. Also revisit the emotional-description beats in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:51-61 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:217-255, replacing several current simile-driven explanations with direct tactile, auditory, or bodily detail more in line with Maren's sensory bias.
findings.acceptance_test: In the revised snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:3-5, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:41-43, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:153-155, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:221-223, no more than one cited beat may still rely on an emphatic fragment tag; the others must land through full sentences or clearly different sentence shapes. In snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:51-61 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:217-255, at least two of the current simile-based emotion markers must be replaced by concrete sensory detail a reader can point to in the revised text.

summary: Quiet chapter with strong continuity discipline, distinct voice control, and a clear state shift: Derry leaves, Maren loses his last human tie to Fenhold, and Caul gets the Crook direction. Craft and dialogue hold. The chapter misses a full award/prose pass because the goodbye sometimes certifies its own intended feeling after the betrayal is already legible, and the prose leans on recurring fragment-and-simile emphasis patterns that begin to feel mannered.
